DataRequest.techniqueName: Remote System Discovery,Gather Victim Network Information: IP Addresses,Active Scanning: Scanning IP Blocks,Gather Victim Network Information: Network Topology,Gather Victim Network Information: Network Trust Dependencies
DataRequest.Name: Heavy ICMP Ping sweep / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects excessive number of ICMP echo request packets from the same source to many distinct destinations in a short period of time. Nachi worm exploited pings to spread. The threshold is 50 pings within 3 minutes. Scanning may be a precursor to exploits. However, network management and mapping tools often scan the network for discovery purposes and authorized scanners need to be blocklisted.

SubPattern.name: PingSweep
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic,Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_DenyTraffic) AND (ipProto=1 OR appProtoId=1) AND srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_APP_ACCELOPS) AND srcIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND vdom!="REDE_WIFI"
